attacking_style: Shows willingness to bridge gaps solo and animate races late, but lacks explosive finishing power to sustain efforts when pace intensifies in final phases of mountain stages.
team_tactics: Benefits from INEOS positioning with teammates like McCarthy delivering him into late-race situations, though internal leadership hierarchy appears ambiguous affecting full team commitment to his GC campaigns.
terrain_preference: Capable on sustained climbs with steady gradients where team tempo can control. Exposed on explosive accelerations and critically vulnerable on technical wet descents.
vulnerability: Technical descending in wet conditions is a critical weakness (crashed out of podium position at Giro). Cannot respond when elite climbers accelerate hard in final kilometers of stages.
key_patterns: Requires teammate support for positioning; McCarthy specifically mentioned dragging him forward (2 observations)
Struggles to sustain efforts when pace ramps dramatically in final 70km of mountain stages
INEOS leadership ambiguity limits full team commitment to his GC ambitions across multiple seasons
Wet descending represents genuine GC-ending vulnerability despite strong climbing legs
form_trajectory: neutral: Showed improved form in early 2023 build-up (Tirreno) but crash eliminated GC assessment opportunity. Insufficient recent data post-injury.
